title: Verify Trial Corner is mutually exclusive with other onboarding experiments
description: Test that users assigned to Trial Corner do not see any other onboarding experiments
preconditions: User is in Trial Corner cohort (no consumption in first 5 mins)

steps.description: 1. Activate trial without consuming content for 5 minutes
2. Verify user is assigned to Trial Corner
3. Check if any onboarding experiments are displayed

expected_result: User sees Trial Corner and no other onboarding experiments are shown
